note: Salesforce REST/platform APIs use OAuth 2.0 (connected apps), self-serve developer signup exists via developer.salesforce.com, and Salesforce officially supports MCP (Hosted MCP Servers, GA as of 2026, plus salesforcecli/mcp), confirming auth=OAuth2, self-serve, and mcp_exists=True.
